title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. angustifolium
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved star of Bethlehem, is a subspecies of the Ornithogalum umbellatum plant, belonging to the Hyacinthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. angustifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
